hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgit\s+commit\b' || exit 0; staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only); [ -z "$staged" ] && exit 0; non_docs=$(echo "$staged" | grep -vE '^docs/superpowers/'); [ -n "$non_docs" ] && exit 0; printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Commit contains only docs/superpowers/ files. Spec and plan files must be committed together with their implementation."}}'
